name: @ballsort-multi/phaser-cv-demo
description: Official demo for @ballsort-multi/phaser-cv - Ballsort game with Color-encoded Instance Segmentation
author: Phaser Studio <support@phaser.io> (https://phaser.io/)

scripts.dev:cv: node scripts/ensure-cv-venv.mjs && node scripts/print-cv-links.mjs && (lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8765 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && concurrently -p none "npm run dev:core" "npm run start:cv -w @ballsort-multi/phaser-cv"
scripts.dev:control:all: concurrently -p none "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:control"
scripts.dev:control:cv:all: node scripts/ensure-cv-venv.mjs && node scripts/print-cv-links.mjs && (lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8765 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:9876 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && concurrently -p none "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:control" "npm run start:cv -w @ballsort-multi/phaser-cv"
